Package org.key_project.prover.sequent

Class Sequent

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.sequent.Sequent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<SequentFormula>, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
Sequent.NILSequent
public abstract class Sequent extends Object implements Iterable<SequentFormula>, SyntaxElement
